features.name: Multi-view triangulation from 2D detections
features.notes: Implemented in mas_multiview (C++). mas_multiview_py removed (2026-03-26)

features.name: 3D multi-object tracking (SORT3D)
features.notes: Hungarian + Kalman in mas_tracker

features.name: Gimbal pointing to tracked targets
features.notes: SIYI SDK interface + point_to_region in gimbal_controller

features.name: Multi-vehicle common reference frame
features.notes: GPS/ENU to common frame in mas_common_frame

features.name: YOLO 2D detection with ByteTrack
features.notes: ultralytics_ros tracker_node

features.name: SIYI encoder angles & aircraft attitude injection
features.notes: 0x26 not supported on A8 mini (ZT30 only). 0x22 attitude injection from IMU at 100 Hz. 0x3E GPS injection added. Joint angles derived from 0x0D + aircraft IMU. (2026-04-14)

features.name: Encoder angles as primary gimbal state
features.notes: gimbal_state_rpy_deg now carries derived joint angles: yaw=0x0D encoder, pitch/roll=heading-aircraft (rotated by yaw). Sign verified on bench. 0x07 rate + 0x05 zoom commands added. Yaw drift under 0x22 injection open. Flight test pending. (2026-04-14)

features.name: Mission state machine and command routing
features.notes: Node implemented, launch integrated, sim e2e verified: IDLE→TRACKING→MISSION→IDLE with 3 agents. Offboard gated on mission_state. point_to_region remapped for tracking state (2026-03-26)

features.name: Interface conformance: structured messages, compact cross-agent topics
features.notes: mas_msgs package (TriangulatedPointArray, TargetRayArray). All 6 tasks done. Structured triangulation msg, PoseWithCovarianceStamped fix, compact Bool bbox_empty, target_rays_w, combined_ang_vel_w, zoom_level. QoS unified. Humble migration. Sim e2e verified. (2026-03-27)

features.name: Tracker ray selection (ID-based bearing ray from ego camera)
features.notes: sort3d subscribes to all cameras' TargetRayArrays, uses detection_ids to match target to ego camera ray. ID-based primary + angular fallback. Per-drone deployment. Sim e2e verified: chosen_target_ray_w publishes with ID-based matching on both px4_1 and px4_2. (2026-04-02)

features.name: Isaac Sim gimbal joint state feedback
features.notes: Fixed OmniGraph node types for Isaac Sim 4.5, articulation path /body, targetPrim list form. All 3 launch files updated. Verified publishing. (2026-04-01)

features.name: AoI-aware triangulation covariance (ticket 017)
features.notes: Zero-output bug fix + AoI-aware Σ_drift inflation (Bar-Shalom OOSM). Sim-side compute_sigma_drift() implemented, 100k MC validation passed (constant_velocity model, NEES≈1.2-2.8). C++ node fixes and rosbag validation pending. (2026-04-02)

features.name: Policy value function V(s) monitoring (ticket #015)
features.notes: ValueNetRNN loads from SKRL checkpoint, publishes policy/value at 25 Hz. Operator displays V(s) in fleet table. Camera resolution auto-adapt from camera_info. IMU QoS fix. use_sim_time support. GRU reset button. (2026-04-03)

features.name: Operator monitoring and command interface
features.notes: MVP complete: fleet state aggregation, 7 derived metrics, 6 alert conditions, curses terminal UI with target selection, RViz markers (agents, targets with chosen highlight, AoI lines). Manual target selection via set_target_id topic added to mas_tracker. Verified against live sim. (2026-04-02)

features.name: LOS rate controller stabilization (ticket #022)
features.notes: Resolved. Joint sign inversion (USD -X/-Y axes) fixed with negation at boundary. Jacobian replaced with analytical IK for stability at all gimbal yaw angles. Frustum sign convention fixed. Camera image rock-solid, frustum matches. (2026-04-04)

features.name: Zoom and gimbal topic convention cleanup (ticket #024)
features.notes: Fixed triangulation pitch double-negation (ticket #022 regression). Unified zoom topics: camera/zoom_level (state), camera/zoom_level_cmd (to sim), zoom_rate_cmd (rate in zoom-levels/s). Denormalized gimbal_cmd_los_rate from [-1,1] to rad/s. All topics now carry physically meaningful values. Fixed zoom QoS mismatch (Reliable→BestEffort). (2026-04-04)

features.name: Gimbal LOS stabilization (ticket #020)
features.notes: Comprehensive gimbal stabilization overhaul. Root causes: position mode held fixed body-frame joints, point_to_region wrong frame, roll computed for wrong yaw. Fixes: world-frame targets, analytical IK + optional Jacobian J^{-1} (configurable: analytical/jacobian/combined), anti-windup per-axis, IMU-triggered control loop, duplicate message filtering, topic rename gimbal_cmd_rpy_deg→gimbal_cmd_los_world_deg. LOS convention: positive el=up. Created gimbal_los_tracker_node. Verified: 0.5° az / 0.0° el pointing accuracy during orbit. (2026-04-07)

features.name: Sim topic update rate optimization (ticket #021)
features.notes: Increased PX4 MAVLink streaming rates (LOCAL_POSITION_NED 1→100 Hz, ATTITUDE_QUATERNION 100→250 Hz). Replaced mas_common_frame 10 Hz timer with callback-driven publishing. Increased Isaac rendering_dt to 100 Hz. IMU-triggered gimbal controller at 15 Hz wall-clock. Fixed wall-clock dt inflation at low RTF by using sim-time timestamps. Added servo_rate_limit for delayed feedback stability. (2026-04-07)

features.name: Gimbal encoder verification + calibration sweep + step-response dynamics (ticket #026)
features.notes: gimbal_calibration.py implemented: verify (sign + stream), sweep (yaw/pitch fwd+bwd at 2° for hysteresis), step response (±{2,10,30,60}° with rise/settle/overshoot/τ fit), rate-step phase with continuous 50 Hz streaming of 0x07 commands, optional checkerboard PnP zero-offset. Per-axis MAS-convention bounds prevent silent clamping. Rate-step produces bag_rate_step/, rate_step_trace.csv, rate_step_index.csv, rate_step_summary.csv, rate_model.json. Rate-step run 1776262353: yaw K=73.42 deg/s per u, τ=0.101 s; pitch K=73.56, τ=0.094 s. Linear, symmetric, no deadband. Minimal no-ROS model at gimbal_controller/gimbal_model.py (AxisParams+GimbalAxis+Gimbal) carries these defaults for sim/controller use. Sine-sweep phase still pending. In-flight aerodynamic dynamics remain on ticket-023. (2026-04-15)

features.name: Camera intrinsic calibration with mrcal (ticket #028)
features.notes: Closed at the repo-tooling level. Delivered src/scripts/calibration/ workflow: session tree initializer, mrcal runner, dataset layout, and JSON/CSV summarizer. Ticket artifact references recorded in ticket #028. Bench execution remains an operator step using the delivered workflow. (2026-04-15)

features.name: Low-latency RTSP → ROS2 ingest for SIYI A8 mini (ticket #031)
features.notes: Code-side in src/rtsp_camera/src/rtsp_camera_node.cpp: 5 rtspsrc params (defaults latency_ms=200, drop_on_latency=false, use_tcp, do_retransmission, decoder); codec param swaps depay+parse+decoder default together (h264/h265); NVMM-path auto-detect splices nvvidconv when decoder name starts with nv; rtspsrc buffer-mode=4; appsink sync=false async=false max-buffers=1 drop=true; leaky queue max-size-buffers=1 before appsink; parse config-interval=-1; polling loop replaced with new-sample signal on a dedicated GMainLoop thread; zero-extra-copy raw path when stream dims match requested dims. Added CompressedImage JPEG publisher on <name>/image_raw/compressed, both raw and compressed gated on subscriber_count>0, publishers now use SensorDataQoS (BEST_EFFORT). README updated, src/tmux/rtsp_a8_latency.tmuxp.yaml added. Bench: compressed-only 22.4 Hz/4.1 MB/s mean 179 KB; raw-only 13.9 Hz/86 MB/s mean 6075 KB; concurrent 16.6 Hz raw + 22.0 Hz compressed. Side-by-side v1-strict (latency=10, drop=true) vs relaxed (latency=200, drop=false) identical steady-state; defaults flipped to relaxed. Wired to ultralytics_ros: tracker_node.py image create_subscription now passes qos_profile_sensor_data (BEST_EFFORT) to match; dead use_compressed_input arg/param removed from tracker_drone.launch.xml; tracker_with_cloud_node.cpp message_filters::Subscribers now pass rmw_qos_profile_sensor_data (lidar-path node, fixed in same pass). One-time install .so truncation required clean rebuild of ultralytics_ros. E2E on live A8: /a8/image_raw/compressed ~22 Hz → tracker_node yolov11n-drone.pt CUDA → /yolo_result_vision ~12.6 Hz (Jetson YOLO inference ceiling, not plumbing). Chose avdec_h264 + 960x540 as default after nvv4l2decoder's v4l2 surface-pool floor caused a ~200 ms constant visual offset (disable-dpb + num-extra-surfaces can't shrink below the driver minimum). Glass-to-ROS2 latency measured via QR-code bench (latency_clock_display.py + latency_measurement.py): RTSP path p50 245 ms / p99 281 ms (bias-corrected, 1236 samples, std 17 ms). HDMI->USB-capture path p50 244 ms / p99 313 ms / std 24 ms — not faster; consumer HDMI capture boards re-encode, relocating the bottleneck rather than removing it. ~85% of the 245 ms is upstream of our ROS node (A8 H.264 encoder 150-200 ms + RTSP). Reference for camera classes: MIPI-CSI 5-15 ms, GigE Vision 10-30 ms, USB3 UVC 30-50 ms, consumer IP RTSP 150-300 ms (A8 class). Next-step knob inside ROS is intra-process composition (saves ~15 ms); beyond that, a different camera class or predictive compensation. (2026-04-16)
